purpose: Create a human-free instructional short showing task cards moving through a workflow

shots.subject: a small white robot and three blue task cards
shots.action: the robot stands on the left side of the workbench with the cards neatly arranged on the surface
shots.setting: a bright modern workbench with soft cool-white lighting
continuity_anchors: the robot has a white shell and a round blue indicator light
the key light always comes from the right side of the frame
shots.prompt: Wide shot, locked-off camera. A small white robot stands on the left of a workbench, with three blue cards in the center; soft cool-white lighting. End with the robot's right hand near the first card.

shots.subject: the same white robot and three blue task cards
shots.action: the robot moves the first card to the completed area on the right
continuity_anchors: the robot's blue indicator remains lit
the card moves from left to right
the second and third cards remain in the center of the workbench
shots.prompt: Medium shot with a slow pan right. The same white robot moves the first blue card from the center to the completed area on the right; perform the action once and end with the card lying flat.

shots.subject: a blue card in the completed area on the right and the robot's hand
shots.action: the robot's hand leaves the card and its blue indicator flashes once
shots.setting: the right side of the same workbench, with a slightly blurred background
continuity_anchors: the card in the completed area comes from the previous shot
the robot's shell and blue indicator retain the same appearance
the lighting direction remains from the right side of the frame
shots.prompt: Close-up, locked-off camera. A blue card is clearly visible in the completed area on the right; the robot's white hand leaves the frame and the blue indicator flashes once. End on a stable frame.

governance.deletion_propagation_plan: When access is revoked or content is deleted, make shot candidates, proxy files, final-video derivatives, caches, and accessible links unavailable while retaining minimal audit events

audio.narration: The task is broken down, executed, and completed.

cues.text: The task is broken down first.
An agent then executes it and records the result.

risk.provenance_plan: Record source_revision, per-shot transform_id, release_id, and input and output hashes; verify the final asset's C2PA status before release
risk.disclosure_plan: Disclose that the final video is AI-assisted and retain human-editing and caption records; publish external factual claims only when independently supported by evidence

acceptance.criterion: Each shot performs only its specified single action
The robot and cards retain complete shapes with no obvious flickering or melting
The card moves left to right at a continuous speed
The robot shell and blue indicator are consistent across shots
The card moved in S02 remains consistent in S03's completed area
Narration and captions are semantically correct, stay within the timeline, and receive human review
No real people, sensitive content, or factual claims supported solely by generated video
Rights are confirmed for all visual and audio assets

recovery.retry_policy: Automatically retry only transient technical failures; escalate repeated visual failures for human review
recovery.fallback: Shorten or split a failed shot; if necessary, use a still frame with motion added in post-production
